ddls:
CREATE TABLE "frames" (
  "frame_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frame */,
  "frame_number" INTEGER /* Frame number in the video sequence */,
  "video_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the video source */,
  "capture_date" TEXT /* Date the frame was captured */,
  "capture_time" TEXT /* Time the frame was captured */,
  "frame_duration" REAL /* Duration of the frame in seconds */,
  "fps" REAL /* Frames per second (FPS) of the video */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frame_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_frames_video_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_source_id") REFERENCES video_sources ("video_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "objects" (
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each object */,
  "object_number" INTEGER /* Unique number assigned to the object */,
  "object_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the object type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the object */,
  "object_class" TEXT /* Class of the object (e.g., person, vehicle) */,
  "object_subclass" TEXT /* Subclass of the object (e.g., car, bus) */,
  "object_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of object detection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_objects_object_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_type_id") REFERENCES object_types ("object_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_types" (
  "object_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each object type */,
  "object_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the object type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the object type */,
  "object_type_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the object type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frame_objects" (
  "frame_object_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frame-object pair */,
  "frame_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frame */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object */,
  "range" REAL /* Range of the object in the frame */,
  "velocity" REAL /* Velocity of the object in the frame */,
  "peak_value" REAL /* Peak value of the object in the frame */,
  "x" REAL /* x-coordinate of the object in the frame */,
  "y" REAL /* y-coordinate of the object in the frame */,
  "object_track_id" INTEGER /* Tracking ID of the object across frames */,
  "object_area" REAL /* Area of the object in the frame */,
  "object_orientation" REAL /* Orientation of the object in the frame */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frame_object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_frame_objects_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES objects ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_frame_objects_frame_id FOREIGN KEY ("frame_id") REFERENCES frames ("frame_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_sources" (
  "video_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the video source */,
  "source_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the video source */,
  "source_location" TEXT /* Location of the video source (e.g., city, country) */,
  "source_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the video source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "source_types" (
  "source_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source type */,
  "source_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the source type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source type */,
  "source_type_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the source type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., research, data analysis) */,
  "user_position" TEXT /* Position of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the platform was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the platform */,
  "access_browser" TEXT /* Browser used to access the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key for the metadata (e.g., color, size) */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value for the metadata */,
  "metadata_category" TEXT /* Category of metadata (e.g., color, size) */,
  "metadata_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_metadata_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES objects ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frame_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "frame_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frame */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key for the metadata (e.g., lighting conditions, weather) */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value for the metadata */,
  "metadata_category" TEXT /* Category of metadata (e.g., lighting conditions, weather) */,
  "metadata_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_frame_metadata_frame_id FOREIGN KEY ("frame_id") REFERENCES frames ("frame_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_source_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "video_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video source */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key for the metadata (e.g., camera angle, resolution) */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value for the metadata */,
  "metadata_category" TEXT /* Category of metadata (e.g., camera angle, resolution) */,
  "metadata_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_source_metadata_video_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_source_id") REFERENCES video_sources ("video_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object */,
  "related_object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related object */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., parent, child, sibling) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_relationships_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES objects ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_relationships_related_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_object_id") REFERENCES objects ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frame_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "frame_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frame */,
  "related_frame_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related frame */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., previous, next) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_frame_relationships_frame_id FOREIGN KEY ("frame_id") REFERENCES frames ("frame_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_frame_relationships_related_frame_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_frame_id") REFERENCES frames ("frame_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_features" (
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., color, shape) */,
  "feature_value" TEXT /* Value of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_id", "feature_name")
)
